description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and a wide, angular wingspan. The body is predominantly metallic gray with bold blue and orange accents, giving it a high-tech, advanced appearance. The wings are swept back with additional winglets and fins, suggesting enhanced aerodynamic performance and maneuverability. The cockpit is positioned at the front and is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The underside and rear of the aircraft display multiple engine intakes and exhausts, indicating a jet propulsion system. The overall form is compact yet aggressive, with intricate surface detailing and visible panel lines.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with a metallic gray body, blue and orange accents, swept-back wings, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings, pointed nose, and prominent cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the layered wing structure, engine intakes, and blue/orange detailing on the wings.
description_view_2: Direct nose-on view emphasizing the sharp nose, cockpit placement, and symmetrical wing configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view revealing the rear winglets, engine exhausts, and additional surface details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept-back wings, prominent winglets, and additional vertical and horizontal stabilizing fins.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a low horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with visible main and nose gear bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
